candidate_definition_hints.text: Diem’s mission is to build a trusted and innovative financial network that empowers people and businesses around the world.

> **Note to readers:** Silvergate Capital Corporation announced in January 2022 that it acquired intellectual property and other technology assets related to running a blockchain-based payment network from Diem, further investing in its platform and enhancing its existing stable…
